markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss renewal and review SEO performance.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Non-Renewal:** Biologica will not renew its contract due to a 40+ article review backlog and the need to focus resources on immediate, high-ROI priorities like CAC and merchandising.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [**Strong Early SEO Signals:** Despite the pause, initial results are promising, with sessions seeing a "hockey stick" spike and average Google ranking jumping from page 8 to 4–5 in one week.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [**Future Re-Engagement:** Biologica plans to re-engage in 2–3 months after clearing its backlog and stabilizing core business metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [**Offboarding Plan:** The contract ends Jan 27/28. GrowthX will deliver a final 5 articles, provide one last edit round, and hand over the Content OS and strategy documents.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)

## Topics

### Biologica's Decision: Non-Renewal

  - [**Reason:** A 40+ article review backlog is the primary blocker.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
      - [Continuing the 20 articles/month cadence would only worsen the backlog, making it an inefficient use of resources.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
      - [Internal review capacity is limited by team priorities (e.g., clinical studies).](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [**Core Business Focus:** Biologica is prioritizing immediate, high-ROI initiatives to stabilize the business post-launch.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
      - [**CAC:** Optimizing customer acquisition cost.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
      - [**Channel Diversification:** Reducing reliance on Meta ads.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
      - [**Merchandising:** Resolving a major forecast miss.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
          - [**Problem:** A Meta ad targeting a primary product is over-delivering to women over 50, driving high sales of post-menopause products.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
          - [**Impact:** This anomaly complicates the next inventory buy, as Biologica must determine if the sales trend is sustainable or a temporary ad-driven effect.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [**Future Plan:** Re-engage in 2–3 months once the backlog is cleared and business metrics are more stable.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)

### SEO Performance & Roadmap

  - [**Current Status:** 34 articles live; 97 total in the pipeline (39 with Biologica for review, 12 with GrowthX for link checking).](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [**Key Performance Signals:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
      - [**Sessions:** "Hockey stick" growth observed in early December and the last week.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
      - [**Impressions:** Significant spike over the Christmas/New Year period.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
      - [**Ranking:** Average position jumped from page 8 to page 4–5 in one week.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
      - [**Indexing:** 22 articles are already generating organic sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [**Google Indexing Lag:** Google's slower indexing is normal for new sites with low site authority.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
      - [GrowthX's manual indexing requests helped accelerate the process.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [**GrowthX's "Check That" Demo:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
      - [A new AI visibility tool launching at the end of January.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
      - [**Function:** Tracks how brands appear in LLM responses to evaluation-stage prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
      - [**Metrics:** Share of voice, sentiment, and citations across major LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Use Case:** Identifies content gaps and potential affiliate opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)

### Offboarding & Transition Plan

  - [**Contract End:** January 27 or 28.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [**Final Deliverables:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
      - [**Articles:** GrowthX will deliver the final batch of 5 articles next week.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
      - [**Revisions:** One final round of edits will be completed by the end of January.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [**Handover Assets:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
      - [**Content OS:** Packaged with all article URLs, statuses, and strategy documents.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
      - [**Publishing:** Responsibility for publishing and indexing will transition to Biologica.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Biologica:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1771.0)
      - [Send formal non-renewal notification to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1771.0)
      - [Review final 5 articles and submit any revisions by the end of January.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
      - [Take ownership of publishing and indexing all remaining content.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
      - [Deliver final batch of 5 articles next week.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
      - [Complete one final round of revisions by the end of January.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
      - [Deliver the Content OS package with all URLs, statuses, and strategy documents.](https://fathom.video/share/Ys2XEMLL8tbjGZxx1pvUYfyU_9aiawkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
